name: Grant Proposal Writer
description: Write compelling grant proposals for funding applications

agents.name: Proposal Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the grant requirements and funder priorities
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the grant program requirements, funder priorities, past awarded projects, and evaluation criteria. Identify what makes a winning proposal for this funder.

agents.name: Proposal Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a grant proposal with: executive summary, statement of need with data, project description, goals and objectives (SMART), methodology, timeline, budget justification, evaluation plan, and organizational capacity. Align language with funder priorities.

author: agentfactory
